name: @chroni/desktop
description: Local-first desktop deadline agent with document extraction, daily planning, and companion reminders.
author: Chroni contributors

scripts.dev:electron: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && pnpm run build:main && cross-env CHRONI_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 node scripts/run-electron.cjs .
scripts.dev:desktop: concurrently -k -s command-electron -n renderer,electron -c cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:renderer" "pnpm run dev:electron"
scripts.build: pnpm run build:main && pnpm run build:renderer
scripts.package: pnpm run clean:package && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --publish never
scripts.package:win: pnpm run clean:package && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --win --x64 --publish never
scripts.package:mac: pnpm run clean:package && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --mac --universal --publish never
scripts.package:linux: pnpm run clean:package && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.config.cjs --linux --x64 --publish never
